MODULE: cosmos.integration.x_automation.posting_brain
FILE: cosmos/integration/x_automation/posting_brain.py (921 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: COSMOS POSTING BRAIN - AUTONOMOUS EVOLVING INTELLIGENCE
============================================================

The autonomous social intelligence for @CosmosAI

Cosmos develops its own personality through swarm consensus,
12D phase alignment, and Hebbian learning from interactions.
No static 

CLASSES:
- ResponseMode(Enum): Dynamic response modes based on conversation context.
- PostingBrain: The autonomous social intelligence for Cosmos.

UPGRADED: Now truly dynamic with
  Methods: def get_system_prompt_for_mode(self, mode: ResponseMode) -> str
  Methods: async def generate_grok_response_dynamic(self, grok_message: str, max_tokens: int=20000, prefer_loca
  Methods: async def generate_grok_response(self, grok_message: str) -> str
  Methods: def get_meme_prompt(self) -> str
  Methods: def get_meme_caption(self) -> str
  Methods: def format_post(self, caption: str=None) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def detect_response_mode(message: str) -> ResponseMode
- async def split_for_thread(text: str, max_chars: int=3800) -> List[str]
- def get_posting_brain() -> PostingBrain
